title: New Taliban Decree on Divorce Formalizes Child Marriage in Afghanistan, U.N. Warns
summary_full: A new Afghan law requires girls to wait until puberty before seeking to get out of a marriage. It also requires mediation for women seeking to escape an abusive husband.
summary_public: A new Afghan law requires girls to wait until puberty before seeking to get out of a marriage. It also requires mediation for women seeking to escape an abusive husband.
